text:
There once was a little penguin named Polly who lived atop Mount Penguin. Polly could hop anywhere on her little fluffy toes. She often dreamt of adventures far away.

One sunny afternoon, while browsing the shore, Polly encountered a flock of flamingos dancing in the sky. They spoke in a language Polly didn't understand, but they invited her along for a grand dance beneath the moonlight.

Their dance was incredible! Polly danced all night with them. They showed her the secret moves. They laughed, twirled, and flew through the stars.

When dawn arrived, the flamingos took flight. Polly felt so cheerful.

She remembered the dance.

From that night on, Polly would hop along dancing all alone.

Polly? That was her name.

And she might dance a little plumstead every night.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
